sentences.english: When I first moved to Canada, I didn't speak English very well.
sentences.korean: 처음 캐나다로 갔을 때 영어를 잘 하지 못했어요.

sentences.english: I was nervous about everything — ordering food and asking for directions.
sentences.korean: 모든 것이 긴장됐어요 — 음식 주문하는 것과 길을 묻는 것이요.

sentences.english: But after a few months, I started to feel more comfortable.
sentences.korean: 하지만 몇 달 후 더 편안해지기 시작했어요.

sentences.english: I made friends at a language school, and they helped me practice every day.
sentences.korean: 어학원에서 친구를 사귀었고 매일 연습을 도와줬어요.

sentences.english: The hardest part was missing my family and Korean food.
sentences.korean: 가장 힘든 부분은 가족과 한국 음식이 그리운 거였어요.

sentences.english: Looking back, that experience changed my life in so many positive ways.
sentences.korean: 돌이켜 보면 그 경험이 내 인생을 여러 긍정적인 방식으로 바꿨어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
